args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, name FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

args.query: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.0;

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.0;

result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedTable) relation "review" does not exist
LINE 1: ...N (SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GRO...
                                                             ^

[SQL: SELECT bd.name, bd.gmap_id, r.avg_rating FROM business_description bd JOIN (SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.0) r ON bd.gmap_id = r.gmap_id WHERE LOWER(bd.description) LIKE '%%massage%%';]

args.query: SELECT bd.name, bd.gmap_id, r.avg_rating FROM business_description bd JOIN (SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.0) r ON bd.gmap_id = r.gmap_id WHERE LOWER(bd.description) LIKE '%massage%';

args.query: SELECT name, gmap_id FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT name, gmap_id FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

result.preview: "No massage therapy businesses with an average rating of at least 4.0 could be identified from the provided databases. Specifically, there are no businesses in the business_database whose description mentions massage, so it is not possible to match any highly rated reviews from the review_database to massage therapy businesses."

args.answer: No massage therapy businesses with an average rating of at least 4.0 could be identified from the provided databases.
